zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler於1637年2月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。他於1658年與Sarah Stone在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1688年8月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年51歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德費爾斯特 邱奇 本 克里斯蒂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler于1637年2月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。他于1658年与Sarah Stone在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1688年8月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年51岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德費爾斯特 邱奇 本 克里斯蒂。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler was born on 26 February 1637, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. He married Sarah Stone in 1658, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 29 August 1688, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 51, and was buried in First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler est né le 26 février 1637, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il a épousé Sarah Stone en 1658, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 29 août 1688, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler è nato il il 26 febbraio 1637 nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Lui sposato Sarah Stone nel 1658, nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 29 agosto 1688, nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Butlerは1637年2月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで生まれた。1658年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードでSarah Stoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1688年8月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで51歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードフィルスト チャーチ オフ チリストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler(은)는 1637년 2월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 태어났다. 그는 1658년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 Sarah Stone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1688년 8월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드 피르스트 처르치 프 크리스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler nasceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1637, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Ele casou-se com Sarah Stone em 1658, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de agosto de 1688, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler родился 26 февраля 1637 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Stone в 1658 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 29 августа 1688 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности фирст чурч оф краист, хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler nació el 26 de febrero de 1637, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Se casó con Sarah Stone en 1658, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 29 de agosto de 1688, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
